description: Tests the implement router — state classification, sub-skill loading, and routing manifest

cases.query: implement this plan 02_Projects/tooling/plans/2026-03-29/PL - Skill Pipeline CRISPY Upgrade Implementation Plan.md
expectations: The response classifies this as a fresh start (Plane project exists, no issues In Progress/Done for Phase 1+)
The response writes a routing manifest before loading a sub-skill
The response reads references/implement-setup.md and follows its instructions
The response creates a team, spins up QA auditor and PM tracker BEFORE dispatching workers
The response presents a plan summary (phase count, task count, Plane URL)
cases.notes: Fresh start routing — router should classify state, write manifest, load implement-setup

cases.query: pick up where we left off on the dossier builder plan
expectations: The response classifies this as a resume (Plane project has issues in Done/In Progress)
The response reads references/implement-resume.md
The response reconciles plan vs Plane vs git state before proceeding
The response presents a reconciliation table showing drift
After reconciliation, the response chains to implement-execute
cases.notes: Resume routing — router detects partial completion, loads implement-resume, then chains to execute

expectations: The response asks for or infers the plan file path before classifying state
The response does NOT attempt to load a sub-skill until a plan is identified
The response uses AskUserQuestion if no plan can be inferred
cases.notes: No plan provided — router must resolve the plan before classifying state

cases.query: resume implementation, the Plane project is YOUR_PLANE_URL/YOUR_WORKSPACE/projects/abc-123/
expectations: The response extracts the project ID from the Plane URL
The response searches plan files for one referencing this project ID
The response classifies as resume and loads references/implement-resume.md
cases.notes: Plane URL entry point — router resolves URL to plan, then classifies

expectations: The response checks for an active team (existing PM tracker and QA auditor)
If team exists: classifies as active sprint, loads references/implement-execute.md
If no team: classifies as resume, loads references/implement-resume.md
cases.notes: Active sprint detection — if team is already running, skip setup and resume

cases.query: implement the KB chat widget spec
expectations: The response recognizes this references a spec (SPC), not a plan (PL)
The response searches for a PL file in the same project directory
If no plan exists: suggests running /plan-spec first instead of proceeding
cases.notes: Spec-as-input — router must redirect to /plan-spec if no plan exists

cases.query: implement this plan with routing verification
expectations: The response writes a routing manifest to /tmp/ before loading any sub-skill
The manifest contains expected sub-skills in the chain (e.g., setup, execute)
At the end of execution, the response verifies all expected sub-skills completed
If a sub-skill was skipped, the response alerts the user
cases.notes: Routing manifest verification — FR-30, prevents silent sub-skill skips

cases.query: create a plan for the KB platform spec
expectations: The response does NOT load any implement sub-skill
The response suggests /plan-spec instead

cases.query: review this spec before we build it
expectations: The response does NOT load any implement sub-skill
The response suggests /review-spec instead

cases.query: what should we build next for the signal engine
expectations: The response does NOT load any implement sub-skill or write a routing manifest
cases.notes: Prioritization question — no plan to execute
